task_completion.description: The abdominal CT scan volume is successfully loaded into the 3D Slicer viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 3D Slicer interface is visible with axial, sagittal, and coronal views displaying grayscale CT data.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates the axial view to center on the abdominal aorta.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the axial slice view, the crosshairs or view focus is positioned on the circular cross-section of the aorta (located anterior to the spine).

task_completion.description: A measurement ruler (markup) is placed across the diameter of the aorta.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible line (usually colored) is drawn across the aorta's cross-section in the axial view, indicating a diameter measurement.

task_completion.description: The measurement value (in mm) is displayed on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A numeric value (e.g., '32.4 mm') is visible either as a label on the ruler in the slice view or within the Markups module panel.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a JSON report containing the diameter, vertebral level, and clinical assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is open showing JSON content with keys 'maximum_diameter', 'vertebral_level', and 'clinical_assessment'.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the measurement markup and the report to the specified paths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog, file explorer, or terminal command confirms saving 'agent_measurement.mrk.json' and 'aorta_report.json' to '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the software's measurement tools rather than estimating or guessing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Markups/Ruler tool being active and placed on the image.

integrity.description: The value written in the report must match the measurement visible in the Slicer interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The number in the text editor (JSON) should correspond to the number shown on the ruler/markup panel in previous steps.

integrity.description: The agent must open the image before generating the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report generation step must occur after the image loading and measurement steps.
